stem: A botanist studying a bamboo shoot recorded its height at the start of an experiment and again on each of the following 14 days. The botanist found that the height of the shoot increased by an average of 1.50 centimeters per day during the 14 days. If the height of the shoot on the last day was 48.5 centimeters, what was the height, in centimeters, of the shoot at the start of the experiment?
rationale: Total growth over 14 days = 14 × 1.50 = 21 cm. Initial height = final height - total growth = 48.5 - 21 = 27.5 cm.
